# Underdial

> Underdial is an iOS app for watch buyers. You search any watch under $1,000
> and it checks the piece against the collection you already own, your budget,
> and your wrist size — then gives a plain verdict, flags anything redundant,
> lists cheaper ways to the same style, and audits your whole box. The app does
> not sell watches. It links out to retailer pages when users want to buy.
> Affiliate links are disclosed.

## Site
- [Home](https://underdial.com/): app overview, features, FAQ
- [About](https://underdial.com/about): who runs Underdial, editorial standards, what the app is and is not
- [Features](https://underdial.com/features): WatchFit check, redundancy flagging, cheaper alternatives, Box Audit, browse, rotation
- [Articles](https://underdial.com/articles): buying guides for the under-$1,000 watch buyer (archetypes, movements, sizing, value)
- [Support](https://underdial.com/support): subscription cancellation, data deletion, troubleshooting
- [Privacy Policy](https://underdial.com/privacy): data collection and handling — no account, data stays on device
- [Terms of Service](https://underdial.com/terms): eligibility, subscriptions, affiliate disclosure
- [Delete Data](https://underdial.com/delete-account): how to permanently delete your on-device data

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://underdial.com/sitemap-index.xml): full URL index updated on every build
